opportunities.niche: Aesthetic, functional foraging tools and digital guides for urban wildcrafters
opportunities.rationale: This market is growing rapidly and demonstrates demand for both physical tools and digital knowledge. By offering a curated line of aesthetically pleasing yet highly functional foraging tools (physical product) combined with comprehensive, modern digital guides (info-product/newsletter), Day14 can serve a community looking to combine their love for nature with a contemporary lifestyle.

opportunities.niche: Secure and private integration of AI tools for individuals and small businesses.
opportunities.rationale: The rapid adoption of AI has created a significant privacy paradox: immense utility versus substantial data risk. Many users are hesitant to input sensitive information into public AI models. opportunities.niche: Curated sensory and organizational boxes for neurodivergent adults
opportunities.rationale: This opportunity directly addresses a significant underserved market by providing curated, adult-focused sensory and organizational tools via a recurring subscription model. SMB suppliers need affordable, practical tools and guidance to understand these demands, collect necessary data, and provide compliant documentation to retain business. opportunities.niche: Simplified US state data privacy compliance for small businesses.
opportunities.rationale: The proliferation of distinct state data privacy laws (e.g., CCPA/CPRA, TDPSA, OCPA, DPDPA) creates an urgent, ongoing demand for simplified compliance guidance and tools for SMBs. These businesses cannot afford expensive legal counsel or enterprise software, making affordable, actionable info-products highly valuable for navigating this complex regulatory environment.

opportunities.rationale: AI is a dominant trend, but many tools are either too complex or too generic for solo founders. opportunities.rationale: This niche leverages the significant online presence and spending power of seniors while addressing their documented pain points around usability and trust. An agency model allows for personalized, high-touch service that builds confidence and loyalty, leading to recurring revenue. The solo founder can start with a small client base and scale by refining processes and potentially incorporating AI

opportunities.niche: Comfortable, stylish, and sensitive-skin friendly piercing jewelry and aftercare
opportunities.rationale: The substantial growth in flat-back earrings highlights a widespread unmet need for comfortable piercing solutions. By offering both modern, sensitive-skin-friendly jewelry and comprehensive, gentle aftercare products, we can create a trusted brand that solves common pain points (discomfort, irritation, removal for sleep) for a growing demographic of piercing enthusiasts and parents.

opportunities.niche: Streamlined Stormwater Pollution Prevention Plan (SWPPP) and compliance for small businesses
opportunities.rationale: Small businesses lack the dedicated compliance teams and advanced systems of larger corporations, making environmental regulations like stormwater management a disproportionate burden. opportunities.niche: Verifying ethical and sustainable fashion claims amidst widespread greenwashing.
opportunities.rationale: Consumers are overwhelmed by conflicting 'sustainable' claims and deeply distrustful of brands due to widespread greenwashing. A specialized newsletter provides a low-overhead, high-value solution for a solo founder to deliver deeply researched, transparent, and actionable information, helping consumers make genuinely ethical fashion choices and building a loyal community.

opportunities.niche: Guided government contracting and proposal assistance for small businesses
opportunities.rationale: The complexity and fragmentation of government procurement information represent a significant barrier for small businesses trying to access a massive market with set-aside opportunities. A SaaS platform that simplifies opportunity discovery, provides guided proposal writing, and helps manage compliance can empower these businesses to compete effectively and secure stable revenue streams.

opportunities.niche: Flexible inventory and materials tracking for niche makers and specialized shops
opportunities.rationale: Many small businesses in niche manufacturing and retail sectors face unique inventory challenges that are poorly addressed by generic or overly complex ERP solutions. opportunities.niche: Meal plans, recipes, and curated grocery lists for chronic gut health conditions.
opportunities.rationale: This niche taps into a highly motivated audience with a clear, persistent problem not fully addressed by supplement companies. An info-product model allows for rapid creation and distribution of high-value digital assets (meal plans, recipe packs) that directly solve this pain point. This can be expanded into a subscription newsletter or even a course on 'cooking for your gut.'

opportunities.rationale: The consistent stream of pet food recalls has created a significant void in consumer trust. A brand built on extreme transparency and verifiable safety directly addresses this unmet demand, offering a premium alternative to compromised mass-market options.

human_todos.title: Get an Anthropic API key — unblocks all agent builds
human_todos.detail: Builds (Kennum and every future business) keep dying on the Gemini 429 quota. The durable fix is the Claude fallback, now wired into the whole bootstrap chain — it just needs a key. Generate one at console.anthropic.com -> Settings -> API Keys (requires enabling API billing). Then paste the key to Claude; Claude will add it to .env.local + Vercel and re-run the Kennum build for you.

human_todos.title: Add MAILERLITE_API_KEY to .env.local + Vercel
human_todos.detail: Newsletter signup on day14.us and every brand site stays inert until this key is set. Get it from mailerlite.com -> Integrations -> Developers -> API, then paste it to Claude to wire in.

human_todos.title: Publish the 10 Hot Flash Co product drafts in Printify
human_todos.detail: Agents generated 10 menopause-humor mug designs and created the product drafts. Open Printify -> Hot Flash Co -> publish them to the Pop-Up Store so they go live.

human_todos.title: Confirm Kennum Lawn Care's real phone, service area + pricing
human_todos.detail: The Kennum site is live with starting-at price estimates and a quote form (no phone listed yet). Send Claude the real business phone number, the exact SWFL towns served, and confirmed pricing so the site shows real numbers instead of estimates. Source of truth: src/app/brands/kennum-lawn-care/theme.ts.

human_todos.title: Feed the real estate intake — drop a county property CSV
human_todos.detail: The real estate segment is built and the agents run, but they have no data yet. Download a property-appraiser data export from a county site (e.g. Lee County leepa.org, Collier collierappraiser.com) and drop the CSV into businesses/day14-realty/intake/. The intake agent ingests + evaluates it on the next scout run.

human_todos.title: Generate brand identity for Hot Flash Co
human_todos.detail: hot-flash-co has no brand-identity.json, so its site falls back to default colors and fonts. Run: node scripts/brand-identity-generator.mjs --slug hot-flash-co --display-name "Hot Flash Co" --niche "Real goods for the seasons no one warns you about."

human_todos.title: Publish blog content for Hot Flash Co
human_todos.detail: No blog drafts exist yet for hot-flash-co, so the blog page is empty. The daily content engine generates them; confirm its LaunchAgent is installed, then review and mark drafts status: live.

human_todos.title: Add a property-valuation API key (REALESTATE_API_KEY)
human_todos.detail: Optional but recommended. The evaluation layer already scores deals from county data alone; a licensed API (RentCast is cheapest — rentcast.io) adds AVM value + rent estimates for sharper flip/rental scores. Generate a key, then paste it to Claude to add as REALESTATE_API_KEY in .env.local + Vercel.

human_todos.title: County records needed: Collier County, FL
human_todos.detail: Day14 needs the public-records property roll for Collier County, FL. Search "Collier County FL property appraiser data export" (or the county GIS / open-data portal), download the CSV, and drop it into businesses/day14-realty/intake/ — name it "collier-county.csv". The scout ingests, scores, and starts monitoring it automatically.

human_todos.title: County records needed: Lee County
human_todos.detail: Day14 needs the public-records property roll for Lee County. Search "Lee County  property appraiser data export" (or the county GIS / open-data portal), download the CSV, and drop it into businesses/day14-realty/intake/ — name it "lee-county.csv". The scout ingests, scores, and starts monitoring it automatically.
